title: OshKosh B'gosh Haskell Faux Fur Lace-Up Boots Toddler Size 8M Brown
listperfectly_description:
Cozy faux-fur-lined hiker boots ready to keep little adventurers warm and stylish from the playground to weekend errands.

Built with a pebbled faux-leather upper and a plush faux-fur collar and lining, the OshKosh B'gosh Haskell boot blends cold-weather warmth with rugged hiker styling. Two-tone braided laces thread through D-ring eyelets for a secure, adjustable fit, while the chunky ridged rubber outsole provides traction on slippery surfaces. A branded suede-look tongue tab and molded OshKosh outsole logo add a premium touch to a boot built for toddler life.

You will receive the following item(s):
- Toddler Boots (pair)

Approximate measurements are listed below.
- Size / Fit: US Kids 8 / UK 7 / EU 24 / AU 7 / M Reg Width
- Outsole length (heel-to-toe): ~6.25 in (15.9 cm)
- Outsole width (widest): ~3 in (7.6 cm)
- Insole length (heel to toe): ~5.75 in (14.6 cm)
- Heel height: ~0.75 in (1.9 cm)
- Shaft height (from outsole): ~4 in (10.2 cm)
- Weight (pair): ~0 lb 10 oz (0.28 kg)

Photos show exact condition from every angle; ask any questions before these are scooped up.
